subcodes.first_line: In these days news hath reached Us that His honour Hají Haydar, from among the people of Najafábád, at the hour of prayer in Isfahán [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این ایام خبر رسیده است که جناب حاجی حیدر از اهل نجف آبد را در اصفهان وقت صلاة
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @chastisement and requital, @firmness in the Covenant, @justice and wrath of God
